title: Ideology and social policy
description: Test your skills in this quiz on ideology and social policy
topic_path: How do political beliefs shape views on society and culture?

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which of the following policies would a liberal politician most likely support?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: Increasing funding for school lunch programs
Enforcing federal prohibition on the use of marijuana

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which of the following policies would a conservative politician most likely support?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: increasing funding for Medicaid and Medicare

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which of the following policies would a libertarian politician most likely support?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: Increasing funding for Medicaid and Medicare

assessment_items.question_content:
Use the infographic below to answer the following question. 

![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/73fb7badda7089e2f824a4a217d5de41.jpg)

**Which of the following Democratic positions from the infographic would a Libertarian most likely agree with?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

**Which of the following policy positions is most associated with the libertarian political ideology in the US?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: removing any legal punishment for gambling
establishing a non-denominational prayer for schools
strengthening air and water quality control regulations

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which of the following policy positions is most associated with the liberal political ideology in the US?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: establishing mandatory sentencing for violent crimes
overturning the Roe v. Wade right-to-privacy precedent

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which of the following sets of policies appears to be most influenced by a conservative ideology?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: ban the use of books in public schools that have dangerous or controversial themes
establish legal protections for undocumented children who have grown up in the United States
abolish the death penalty as it is cruel and unusual punishment
expand social welfare programs for the most vulnerable populations

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which of the following sets of policies appears to be most influenced by a liberal ideology?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: establish a universal healthcare program to insure all Americans
expand production of oil, coal, and natural gas industries
create strict identification requirements for voting
ban transgender individuals from serving in the military

assessment_items.question_content:
Use the infographic below to answer the following question. 

![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/73fb7badda7089e2f824a4a217d5de41.jpg)

**Based on the infographic, which of the following claims could a media organization make about the ideological leanings of the Democratic party? **

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: The Democratic party leans towards a liberal ideology because they favor more government involvement to ensure social and economic equality
The Democratic party leans towards a conservative ideology because they favor less government involvement to ensure social and economic equality
The Democratic party leans towards a libertarian ideology because they disfavor any government involvement in most social issues
The Democratic party has no ideological leanings to appeal to a broad base of voters of non-aligned and centrist voters

assessment_items.question_content:
Use the infographic below to answer the following question. 

![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/73fb7badda7089e2f824a4a217d5de41.jpg)

**Based on the infographic, which of the following claims could a media organization make about the ideological leanings of the Republican party?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: The Republican party leans towards a conservative ideology because they favor less government involvement in trying to impact social and economic equality
The Republican party leans towards a liberal ideology because they favor more government involvement to ensure social and economic equality
The Republican party leans towards a libertarian ideology because they disfavor any government involvement in most social issues
The Republican party has no ideological leanings to appeal to a broad base of voters of non-aligned and centrist voters

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which of the following is an accurate comparison of conservative and liberal views concerning social policy?**

 | Liberal | Conservative
- | - | -
**A** | The federal government should conduct background checks for gun purchases | The federal government should not restrict an individual’s access to a gun
**B** | The federal government should regulate and restrict access to abortion procedures | The federal government should respect a person’s right to privacy and not restrict access to abortion procedures
**C** | The federal government should allow same-sex marriage | The federal government should not make policy decisions on marriage 
**D** | The federal government should allow voluntary prayer in schools for all students | The federal government should allow more state experimentation with school vouchers and charter schools

[[☃ radio 1]]

**Which of the following is an accurate comparison of conservative and liberal views concerning social policy?**

 | Liberal | Conservative
- | - | -
**A** | The federal government should not require an educator to teach evolution if it goes against their religious beliefs | The federal government should allow voluntary prayer in schools for all students
**B** | The federal government should not restrict an individual’s access to a gun | The federal government should conduct background checks for gun purchases
**C** | The federal government should legalize and regulate the use of marijuana | The federal government should decriminalize marijuana and other drugs
**D** | The federal government should allow same-sex marriage |  The federal government should restrict marriage to one man and one woman

[[☃ radio 1]]

**Which of the following is an accurate comparison of conservative and liberal views concerning social policy?**

 | Liberal | Conservative
- | - | -
**A** | The federal government should provide free healthcare programs for those who are unable to afford one | The federal government should be responsible for providing welfare programs for low-income people
**B** | The federal government should legalize and regulate the use of marijuana | The federal government should maintain its position on prohibiting the use of marijuana
**C** | The federal government should prevent race and gender from being taken into account for hiring decisions | The federal government should encourage affirmative action programs for employment 
**D** | The federal government should allow voluntary prayer in schools for all students | The federal government should not require a business to serve a same-sex couple if it goes against their religious beliefs

[[☃ radio 1]]

Use the infographic below to answer the following question. 

![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/73fb7badda7089e2f824a4a217d5de41.jpg)

**Which of the following Republican positions from the infographic would a Libertarian most likely agree with?**
